events.name: phobos_transit
events.description: Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.

events.name: breakthrough
events.description: New hydroponics technique doubles crop yield per unit water.

events.name: equipment_failure
events.description: The primary water recycler fails catastrophically.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

meta_awareness.insight: Dax Iron wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.
Luna Tide dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.
Ora Flame asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'

memories.event: The primary water recycler fails catastrophically.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.
Electronics damaged by electromagnetic pulse from solar event.
The worst dust storm in decades buries the southern airlock.
Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.
Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Regolith dust causes chronic respiratory inflammation.
Ice geyser breaks through permafrost near the colony perimeter.
A rich vein of iron oxide uncovered during excavation.
Severe radiation event — all colonists confined to shielded core.
Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.
Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.

Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
